site.name: Shiba Gastroenterology & Proctology Clinic
site.tagline: Proctology & gastroenterology clinic in Shiba, Minato-ku, Tokyo

common.disclaimerTitle: ⚠ Unofficial demo — NOT the clinic's official website
common.disclaimerText: This is a personal demonstration recreation. It is NOT affiliated with the clinic, and you CANNOT make real appointments here.

home.metaTitle: Shiba Gastroenterology & Proctology Clinic | Proctology & Gastroenterology in Tokyo
home.metaDescription: English-speaking proctology and gastroenterology clinic in Shiba, Minato-ku, Tokyo. Day surgery for hemorrhoids, anal fissures and fistula, painless colonoscopy, gastroscopy, H. pylori testing and vaccinations. A 3-minute walk from Mita Station. Foreign residents welcome.
home.heroTitle: A proctology and digestive-health clinic you can talk to with confidence
home.heroSubtitle: From day surgery for hemorrhoids to painless colonoscopy — careful, individual care in a private, comfortable setting.
home.introBody: Shiba Gastroenterology & Proctology Clinic is a specialist clinic for proctology, gastroenterology and digestive medicine in Shiba, Minato-ku, Tokyo. Since opening in 2013, we have cared for a wide range of conditions — from hemorrhoids, anal fissures and fistula to digestive complaints and gastric and colonoscopic endoscopy. We take care over clear explanations and a comfortable setting so that even sensitive concerns can be raised with confidence.
home.foreignBody: We provide care in English, and many of our patients are foreign residents in Japan. You can be seen without worrying about the language barrier.

director.metaDescription: Meet Dr. Yukihiro Satoh, director of Shiba Gastroenterology & Proctology Clinic — a board-certified proctologist and surgeon with US medical licensing (USMLE) qualification and clinical experience in the United States.
director.heading: About the Director
director.name: Dr. Yukihiro Satoh
director.title: Director
director.greeting: I founded this clinic in 2013, together with my wife and our staff, out of a wish to build a clinic that truly reflects how we want to care for patients. Concerns about the anus and digestive system can be hard to talk about, so I make a point of listening carefully and offering clear explanations and treatment you can feel comfortable with. Drawing on my clinical experience in the United States, I also see patients in English. Please feel at ease coming to us.
qualifications: Board-certified proctologist, Japan Society of Coloproctology
Certified physician, Japanese Society of Clinical Anorectal Disease
Certified physician in Helicobacter pylori infection
United States Medical Licensing Examination (USMLE) qualification
Certified occupational physician, Japan Medical Association
career: 1991 Graduated, Teikyo University School of Medicine
1991 Emergency & Critical Care Center, Teikyo University Hospital
1993 Department of Surgery, Iwate Houyou Hospital
2001–2010 Emergency and colorectal departments at hospitals in Japan
roles: Visiting colorectal surgeon, Yotsumata Medical Clinic
Committee member, Minato Ward Medical Association

access.metaDescription: How to reach Shiba Gastroenterology & Proctology Clinic: KT Bldg. 3F, 4-11-5 Shiba, Minato-ku, Tokyo 108-0014. 3 min from Mita Station, 6 min from Tamachi Station.
access.heading: Access
stations: About 3 min walk from Mita Station (Toei Mita Line), Exit A9
About 4–5 min walk from Mita Station (Toei Asakusa Line), Exit A6
About 6 min walk from Tamachi Station (JR Yamanote / Keihin-Tohoku Line), Mita/West Exit
access.directions: From Mita Station Exit A9, walk along Mita-dori toward Tamachi. Use the FamilyMart as a landmark; the clinic is on the 3rd floor of the KT Building. If you have trouble finding us, please give us a call.
access.parkingNote: We do not have our own parking. Please use a nearby coin parking lot.

hours.closedNote: Closed: Sundays, public holidays, and the 2nd & 4th Saturday
hours.appointmentNote: Wednesdays are reserved for appointment-only examinations.

services.metaDescription: Proctology (day surgery for hemorrhoids, anal fissures and fistula), gastroenterology (painless colonoscopy, gastroscopy, H. pylori), and vaccinations at Shiba Gastroenterology & Proctology Clinic in Tokyo.
services.heading: Services
services.intro: We focus on proctology and gastroenterology, and also offer endoscopy and vaccinations.

gastroenterology.title: Gastroenterology
gastroenterology.summary: Abdominal and digestive symptoms, H. pylori, and painless colonoscopy and gastroscopy.
gastroenterology.body: We treat a wide range of digestive symptoms — abdominal pain, heaviness or bloating, heartburn and changes in bowel habits. We test for and eradicate Helicobacter pylori, and investigate cases where a checkup shows a positive fecal occult blood test. We diagnose and treat stomach cancer and gastric ulcer, functional dyspepsia (FD) and irritable bowel syndrome (IBS).
conditions: Positive fecal occult blood on screening
gastroenterology.endoscopy: We offer painless colonoscopy with sedation, and gastroscopy that can be done with a thin scope passed through the nose. CO2 insufflation reduces bloating after the examination, and image-enhanced viewing such as NBI helps us assess polyps and inflammation carefully. Polyps can be removed during the examination where appropriate.

proctology.title: Proctology
proctology.summary: Diagnosis and treatment of hemorrhoids, anal fissures and fistula, including day surgery.
proctology.body: A specialist examines symptoms such as anal pain, bleeding, swelling and itching. We offer treatment tailored to your symptoms and wishes — from ALTA (Jion) injection therapy and ligation-excision for hemorrhoids, to surgery for anal fistula, and conservative or surgical care for anal fissures. Day surgery is available, and sensitive concerns are handled in a private, considerate setting.

vaccines.title: Vaccinations & injections
vaccines.summary: Rubella antibody testing, HPV (cervical cancer) vaccine, varicella, tetanus and more.
vaccines.body: We offer rubella antibody testing (free with a voucher for those eligible), the HPV / cervical cancer vaccine (Silgard 9 and Gardasil), varicella (chickenpox) vaccine, tetanus, the RSV vaccine and other vaccinations and injections. Some are covered by Minato Ward subsidies — please contact us for details.

tv.title: Media & TV appearances
tv.summary: Sharing reliable information about proctological and digestive conditions in the media.
tv.body: To help spread accurate knowledge about proctological and digestive conditions, the director appears on and contributes to television programs and other media.

facility.metaDescription: 4K endoscopy systems, a digital anoscope, X-ray and ultrasound, endoscope disinfection, an AED and a deep-UV LED air purifier — our clinic facilities are designed with accuracy, privacy and hygiene in mind.
facility.heading: Our Facility
facility.intro: We have equipped the clinic for accurate diagnosis and treatment you can feel confident about, with attention to privacy and infection control.

anoscope.title: Digital anoscope
anoscope.body: Patients can watch the examination on a monitor and follow the explanation, so they can understand and feel comfortable with their treatment.

endoscope.title: 4K digestive endoscopy systems
endoscope.body: We have a thin transnasal scope (GIF-XP290N) and colonoscopes (CF-EZ1500DI, EVIS X1 CV-1500). CO2 insufflation and image-enhanced viewing such as NBI allow detailed examination while reducing strain on the body.

xray.title: X-ray equipment
xray.body: Used for Minato Ward lung cancer screening and to check for conditions such as intestinal obstruction and fractures.

ultrasound.title: Ultrasound (echography)
ultrasound.body: A low-burden ultrasound examination of abdominal organs such as the liver, gallbladder, pancreas and kidneys, and for diagnosing anal fistula and abscess.

recovery.title: Recovery room
recovery.body: A room where you can rest after an examination or procedure, with seating for companions and refreshments available.

sterilizer.title: Endoscope disinfection system
sterilizer.body: Endoscopes are cleaned and disinfected according to guidelines so that examinations are carried out hygienically.

aed.title: AED (automated external defibrillator)
aed.body: An AED is kept on site in case of a medical emergency.

airPurifier.title: Deep-UV LED air purifier
airPurifier.body: For infection control we use a deep-ultraviolet LED air purifier, along with alcohol sanitizer and acrylic barriers.

price.metaDescription: Pricing at Shiba Gastroenterology & Proctology Clinic. Consultations, examinations and surgery are covered by Japanese health insurance; guideline prices for self-pay services and vaccinations are listed.
price.heading: Pricing
price.intro: Consultations, examinations and surgery are covered by Japanese health insurance (patients usually pay 30%). The amounts below are guideline prices for self-pay services and vaccinations.
price.insuranceNote: Anal consultations and surgery, endoscopy and similar care are insured treatments based on the points set by the Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare. The actual cost depends on the medication and procedures involved, and will be explained at your consultation.
price.selfPayNote: Gastroscopy pricing does not include polyp removal or biopsy.
price.vaccineNote: Minato Ward and other subsidies may be available for those eligible. Please contact us for details.
price.note: The amounts shown are guidelines. Detailed costs are explained at your consultation.

contact.metaDescription: Contact Shiba Gastroenterology & Proctology Clinic by phone or through the online booking form. Tel 03-6453-9307.
contact.heading: Contact
contact.intro: To book an appointment, please use the online booking form or call us.

booking.metaTitle: Book an appointment | Shiba Gastroenterology & Proctology Clinic
booking.metaDescription: Book your appointment online. Choose a date and time and fill in your details.
booking.heading: Book an appointment
booking.intro: Choose a date and time and fill in your details. Your booking is received as a request — the clinic will confirm it by email.
booking.noSlots: No openings on this day. Please choose another date.

form.heading: Your details
form.name: Full name
form.consent: Your information is used to confirm and contact you about your booking.

received.heading: Your request has been received
received.body: We have received your booking as a request. The clinic will review it and send you a confirmation by email. Please wait for the confirmation email.

errors.slotTaken: Sorry — this time slot was just booked. Please choose another time.
errors.invalid: Some details are invalid. Please check and try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong while processing your booking. Please try again shortly.

review.heading: Confirm your booking
review.intro: Please check your details below. Go back to edit anything, or confirm to send your request.

received.subject: We've received your appointment request — Shiba Gastroenterology & Proctology Clinic
received.body: Thank you for your request. We have received your appointment request for the date and time below and will review it. We will send you a separate email once it is confirmed.
received.closing: This is an automatic acknowledgement — your appointment is not confirmed yet. We will be in touch shortly.

confirmed.subject: Your appointment is confirmed — Shiba Gastroenterology & Proctology Clinic
confirmed.body: Thank you for your booking. We are pleased to confirm your appointment for the date and time below.
confirmed.closing: We look forward to seeing you. If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us.

declined.subject: About your appointment request — Shiba Gastroenterology & Proctology Clinic
declined.body: Thank you for your appointment request. We are very sorry, but we are unable to accept your booking for the requested date and time.
declined.closing: Please book again for a different date and time, or contact us by phone. We apologise for the inconvenience.
